title: Caregiver - Prompt PwD Selection During Wishlist Action (20 Test Cases)
overview: Functional testing of SCRUM-414: System prompts caregiver to select a PwD when adding a product to the wishlist. Validates Add to Wishlist triggers PwD selection (AC1), single PwD selection (AC2), Confirm Add disabled until PwD selected (AC3), success toast on confirmation (AC4). Edge cases: cancel selection, switch PwD mid-flow, incomplete PwD profile.

testCases.title: Caregiver can navigate to product detail page
steps: Verify URL contains /product/ or page has product content.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is logged in and on the catalog page.
expectedResults: Caregiver navigates to a product detail page.

testCases.title: Product detail page has product heading
steps: Verify H1 heading is visible with non-empty text.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on a product detail page.
expectedResults: Product detail page displays a product heading.

testCases.title: Add to Wishlist button exists on product detail page
steps: Verify Add to Wishlist / Wishlist / heart button exists.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on a product detail page.
expectedResults: Wishlist button is present on the product detail page.

testCases.title: Clicking Add to Wishlist without PwD shows PwD selection prompt
testCases.feature: Add to Wishlist Triggers PwD Selection
steps: Verify modal, dropdown, or PwD selection prompt appears.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on product detail page, no PwD selected.
expectedResults: PwD selection prompt appears after clicking Add to Wishlist.

testCases.title: PwD selection prompt is a modal or dropdown
testCases.feature: Add to Wishlist Triggers PwD Selection
steps: Verify prompt is a modal dialog, dropdown, or inline selection.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver clicked Add to Wishlist.
expectedResults: PwD selection is presented as a modal or dropdown.

testCases.title: PwD selection lists available PwDs
testCases.feature: Add to Wishlist Triggers PwD Selection
steps: Verify at least one PwD option is listed.
testCases.preconditions: PwD selection prompt is visible.
expectedResults: PwD selection lists caregiver's linked PwDs.

testCases.title: Caregiver can select only one PwD
steps: Verify only one PwD is selected.
testCases.preconditions: PwD selection prompt visible with multiple PwDs.
expectedResults: Only one PwD can be selected at a time.

testCases.title: Confirm Add button disabled until PwD selected
steps: Verify Confirm Add button is disabled.
testCases.preconditions: PwD selection prompt visible, no PwD selected.
expectedResults: Confirm button is disabled until PwD is selected.

testCases.title: Confirm Add button enabled after PwD selection
steps: Verify Confirm Add button becomes enabled.
testCases.preconditions: PwD selection prompt is visible.
expectedResults: Confirm button enabled after PwD selection.

testCases.title: Clicking Confirm adds product to wishlist
steps: Select PwD and click Confirm Add.
Verify page responds (modal closes, button changes, or confirmation shown).
testCases.preconditions: PwD selected, Confirm Add enabled.
expectedResults: Product is added to the wishlist.

testCases.title: Success toast shows 'Added to <PwD Name>'s wishlist'
steps: After confirming, verify success toast/message appears.
Verify it contains 'added to' and 'wishlist' text.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver confirmed wishlist addition.
expectedResults: Success toast displays 'Added to <PwD Name>'s wishlist'.

testCases.title: Cancelling PwD selection creates no wishlist entry
steps: Cancel or close PwD selection without selecting.
testCases.preconditions: PwD selection prompt is visible.
expectedResults: No wishlist entry created on cancel.

testCases.title: Wishlist button state unchanged after cancel
steps: After cancelling, verify Add to Wishlist button is in original state.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver cancelled PwD selection.
expectedResults: Wishlist button state unchanged after cancel.

testCases.title: Switching PwD mid-flow respects final selection
testCases.preconditions: PwD selection prompt visible with multiple PwDs.
expectedResults: Final PwD selection is respected.

testCases.title: Incomplete PwD profile is still selectable
steps: Verify all PwDs listed including incomplete profiles.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver has a PwD with incomplete profile.
expectedResults: PwD with incomplete profile is still selectable.

testCases.title: Page refresh retains wishlist state
steps: Verify wishlist button state reflects addition.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver added a product to wishlist.
expectedResults: Page refresh retains wishlist state.

testCases.title: Mobile viewport renders wishlist flow correctly
steps: Verify wishlist button and PwD content visible.
testCases.preconditions: Browser viewport set to mobile.
expectedResults: Wishlist flow renders correctly on mobile.

testCases.title: Multiple products have consistent wishlist behavior
steps: Click first View details, verify wishlist button.
Click second View details, verify same behavior.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on catalog page.
expectedResults: Wishlist behavior consistent across products.

testCases.title: Wishlist button state changes after adding
steps: After adding to wishlist, verify button state changes.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver added product to wishlist.
expectedResults: Wishlist button reflects product has been added.

testCases.title: Back navigation from product detail retains catalog state
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on product detail page.
expectedResults: Back navigation retains catalog state.
